cccAD Realtime Collaboration API 1.0.0
  • application/json

WebSocket protocol for cccAD collaborative 2D sketch editing.

REST OpenAPI is used for initial document loading and regular HTTP commands. This AsyncAPI document describes realtime WebSocket messages.

Rules:

  • PostgreSQL sketch operation log is the persistent source of truth.
  • op.committed is the only realtime event after which a client mutates real document state.
  • presence.*, drag.preview, session ping/pong and locks are transient.
  • Redis may be used for presence, locks and pub/sub fanout.
  • S3 is used for previews, exports, imports and large snapshots, not live sketch state.

Servers

  • ws://localhost:8080/api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/wswslocal

    Local development server.

    object
    string
    required

    Sketch identifier.

  • wss://api.cccad.example.com/api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/wswssproduction

    Production server.

    object
    string
    required

    Sketch identifier.

Operations

  • REQUEST /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/ws

    Bidirectional WebSocket channel for one sketch document.

    Client should first load initial state through REST: GET /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}

    Then it should connect to this WebSocket and send session.join.

    Operation IDjoinSession

    Available only on servers:

    • local
    • production
    object
    sketchIdstring
    required

    Sketch identifier from the URL path.

    Accepts the following message:

    Join session
    • application/json
    Message IDSessionJoin
    object

    Examples

    • #1 Example - Join with last seen version
      {
  "type": "session.join",
  "requestId": "req_join_1",
  "sketchId": "sk_123",
  "clientTime": "2026-05-21T10:00:00Z",
  "payload": {
    "lastSeenVersion": 42,
    "clientId": "browser_tab_01",
    "supportedProtocolVersion": 1
  }
}
    REPLY INFORMATION

    REPLY CHANNEL INFORMATION

    Reply will be provided via this designated address: /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/ws
    Address: /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/ws

    Bidirectional WebSocket channel for one sketch document.

    Client should first load initial state through REST: GET /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}

    Then it should connect to this WebSocket and send session.join.

    Available only on servers:

    • local
    • production
    Messages:
    • #0Join session
      • application/json
      Message IDSessionJoin
      object

      Examples

      • #1 Example - Join with last seen version
        {
  "type": "session.join",
  "requestId": "req_join_1",
  "sketchId": "sk_123",
  "clientTime": "2026-05-21T10:00:00Z",
  "payload": {
    "lastSeenVersion": 42,
    "clientId": "browser_tab_01",
    "supportedProtocolVersion": 1
  }
}
    • #1Session joined
      • application/json
      Message IDSessionJoined
      object

      Examples

      • #1 Example - Joined
        {
  "type": "session.joined",
  "requestId": "req_join_1",
  "eventId": "evt_001",
  "sketchId": "sk_123",
  "serverTime": "2026-05-21T10:00:01Z",
  "payload": {
    "protocolVersion": 1,
    "currentVersion": 42,
    "missingOpsAvailable": false,
    "user": {
      "userId": "usr_1",
      "displayName": "David",
      "role": "editor",
      "clientId": "browser_tab_01"
    },
    "activeUsers": [
      {
        "userId": "usr_2",
        "displayName": "Alex",
        "role": "editor",
        "clientId": "browser_tab_02"
      }
    ]
  }
}
    • #2User joined
      • application/json
      Message IDSessionUserJoined
      object

      Examples

      {
  "type": "session.user_joined",
  "eventId": "string",
  "sketchId": "string",
  "serverTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "payload": {
    "userId": "string",
    "displayName": "string",
    "role": "reader",
    "clientId": "string"
  }
}
      This example has been generated automatically.

      Message IDSessionUserLeft

    • #15Commit drag
      • application/json
      Message IDDragCommit
      object

      Examples

      {
  "type": "drag.commit",
  "requestId": "string",
  "sketchId": "string",
  "payload": {
    "lockId": "string",
    "baseVersion": 0,
    "clientOpId": "string",
    "op": {
      "type": "create_point",
      "x": 0.1,
      "y": 0.1,
      "pointId": "string",
      "entityId": "string",
      "constraintId": "string",
      "dimensionId": "string",
      "value": 0.1,
      "radius": 0.1,
      "clockwise": true,
      "closed": true,
      "start": {
        "kind": "existing_point",
        "pointId": "string",
        "x": 0.1,
        "y": 0.1
      },
      "end": {
        "kind": "existing_point",
        "pointId": "string",
        "x": 0.1,
        "y": 0.1
      },
      "center": {
        "kind": "existing_point",
        "pointId": "string",
        "x": 0.1,
        "y": 0.1
      },
      "target": {
        "x": 0.1,
        "y": 0.1
      },
      "cornerA": {
        "x": 0.1,
        "y": 0.1
      },
      "cornerB": {
        "x": 0.1,
        "y": 0.1
      },
      "points": [
        {
          "x": 0.1,
          "y": 0.1
        }
      ],
      "constraint": {
        "id": "string",
        "type": "coincident",
        "refs": [
          "string"
        ],
        "branch": "external",
        "status": "active"
      },
      "dimension": {
        "id": "string",
        "type": "distance",
        "refs": [
          "string"
        ],
        "value": 0.1,
        "driving": true,
        "orientation": "cw"
      }
    }
  }
}
      This example has been generated automatically.

      • application/json
      Message IDOpCommitted
      object

      Examples

      {
  "type": "op.committed",
  "requestId": "string",
  "eventId": "string",
  "sketchId": "string",
  "serverTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "payload": {
    "opId": "string",
    "version": 0,
    "actorUserId": "string",
    "clientOpId": "string",
    "op": {
      "type": "create_point",
      "x": 0.1,
      "y": 0.1,
      "pointId": "string",
      "entityId": "string",
      "constraintId": "string",
      "dimensionId": "string",
      "value": 0.1,
      "radius": 0.1,
      "clockwise": true,
      "closed": true,
      "start": {

        "pointId": "string",

      },

      },

      },

      },

        {
          "x": 0.1,

      ],
      "constraint": {
        "id": "string",
        "type": "coincident",
        "refs": [
          "string"

        "branch": "external",

      "dimension": {
        "id": "string",
        "type": "distance",
        "refs": [
          "string"

    "patch": {

      "diagnostics": [

          "level": "info",
          "code": "string",

          "entityIds": [

          ],
          "constraintIds": [
            "string"
          ],
          "dimensionIds": [
            "string"

        }
      ]
    },
    "affectedEntityIds": [
      "string"
    ]
  }
}

      Message IDOpRejected
      object

      Examples

  "sketchId": "string",
  "serverTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "payload": {

    "message": "string",
    "diagnostics": [
      {
        "level": "info",
        "code": "string",

          "string"

    "toVersion": 0,

        "version": 0,
        "actorUserId": "string",
        "clientOpId": "string",
        "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",

          "y": 0.1,

    object
    sketchIdstring
    required

    Sketch identifier from the URL path.

    • #0Session joined
      • application/json
      Message IDSessionJoined
      object

      Examples

      • #1 Example - Joined
        {
  "type": "session.joined",
  "requestId": "req_join_1",
  "eventId": "evt_001",
  "sketchId": "sk_123",
  "serverTime": "2026-05-21T10:00:01Z",
  "payload": {
    "protocolVersion": 1,
    "currentVersion": 42,
    "missingOpsAvailable": false,
    "user": {
      "userId": "usr_1",
      "displayName": "David",
      "role": "editor",
      "clientId": "browser_tab_01"
    },
    "activeUsers": [
      {
        "userId": "usr_2",
        "displayName": "Alex",
        "role": "editor",
        "clientId": "browser_tab_02"
      }
    ]
  }
}

  • REQUEST /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/ws

    Bidirectional WebSocket channel for one sketch document.

    Client should first load initial state through REST: GET /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}

    Then it should connect to this WebSocket and send session.join.

    Operation IDheartbeat

    Available only on servers:

    • local
    • production
    object
    sketchIdstring
    required

    Sketch identifier from the URL path.

    Accepts the following message:

    Ping
    • application/json
    Message IDSessionPing
    object

    Examples

    {
  "type": "session.ping",
  "requestId": "string",
  "sketchId": "string",
  "clientTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "payload": {
    "clientVersion": 0
  }
}
    This example has been generated automatically.
    REPLY INFORMATION

    REPLY CHANNEL INFORMATION

    Reply will be provided via this designated address: /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/ws
    Address: /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/ws

    Bidirectional WebSocket channel for one sketch document.

    Client should first load initial state through REST: GET /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}

    Then it should connect to this WebSocket and send session.join.

    Available only on servers:

    • local
    • production
    Messages:
    • #0Join session
      • application/json
      Message IDSessionJoin
      object

      Examples

      • #1 Example - Join with last seen version
        {
  "type": "session.join",
  "requestId": "req_join_1",
  "sketchId": "sk_123",
  "clientTime": "2026-05-21T10:00:00Z",
  "payload": {
    "lastSeenVersion": 42,
    "clientId": "browser_tab_01",
    "supportedProtocolVersion": 1
  }
}
    • #1Session joined
      • application/json
      Message IDSessionJoined
      object

      Examples

      • #1 Example - Joined
        {
  "type": "session.joined",
  "requestId": "req_join_1",
  "eventId": "evt_001",
  "sketchId": "sk_123",
  "serverTime": "2026-05-21T10:00:01Z",
  "payload": {
    "protocolVersion": 1,
    "currentVersion": 42,
    "missingOpsAvailable": false,
    "user": {
      "userId": "usr_1",
      "displayName": "David",
      "role": "editor",
      "clientId": "browser_tab_01"
    },
    "activeUsers": [
      {
        "userId": "usr_2",
        "displayName": "Alex",
        "role": "editor",
        "clientId": "browser_tab_02"
      }
    ]
  }
}

        "kind": "existing_point",

        "refs": [

        ],

        "status": "active"

      "dimension": {
        "id": "string",
        "type": "distance",
        "refs": [

    • #21Operations batch
      • application/json
      Message IDOpsBatch
      object

      Examples

      {
  "type": "ops.batch",
  "eventId": "string",
  "sketchId": "string",
  "serverTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "payload": {
    "fromVersion": 0,
    "toVersion": 0,
    "ops": [
      {
        "opId": "string",
        "version": 0,
        "actorUserId": "string",
        "clientOpId": "string",
        "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
        "op": {
          "type": "create_point",
          "x": 0.1,
          "y": 0.1,
          "pointId": "string",
          "entityId": "string",
          "constraintId": "string",
          "dimensionId": "string",
          "value": 0.1,
          "radius": 0.1,
          "clockwise": true,
          "closed": true,
          "start": {
            "kind": "existing_point",
            "pointId": "string",
            "x": 0.1,
            "y": 0.1
          },
          "end": {
            "kind": "existing_point",
            "pointId": "string",
            "x": 0.1,
            "y": 0.1
          },
          "center": {
            "kind": "existing_point",
            "pointId": "string",
            "x": 0.1,
            "y": 0.1
          },
          "target": {
            "x": 0.1,
            "y": 0.1
          },
          "cornerA": {
            "x": 0.1,
            "y": 0.1
          },
          "cornerB": {
            "x": 0.1,
            "y": 0.1
          },
          "points": [
            {
              "x": 0.1,
              "y": 0.1
            }
          ],
          "constraint": {
            "id": "string",
            "type": "coincident",
            "refs": [
              "string"
            ],
            "branch": "external",
            "status": "active"
          },
          "dimension": {
            "id": "string",
            "type": "distance",
            "refs": [
              "string"
            ],
            "value": 0.1,
            "driving": true,
            "orientation": "cw"
          }
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}
      This example has been generated automatically.

  • SEND /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/ws

    Bidirectional WebSocket channel for one sketch document.

    Client should first load initial state through REST: GET /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}

    Then it should connect to this WebSocket and send session.join.

    Operation IDsendPresence

    Available only on servers:

    • local
    • production
    object
    sketchIdstring
    required

    Sketch identifier from the URL path.

    Accepts one of the following messages:

    • #0Cursor presence
      • application/json
      Message IDPresenceCursor
      object

      Examples

      {
  "type": "presence.cursor",
  "requestId": "string",
  "eventId": "string",
  "sketchId": "string",
  "clientTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "serverTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "payload": {
    "userId": "string",
    "clientId": "string",
    "x": 0.1,
    "y": 0.1,
    "viewport": {
      "scale": 0.1,
      "offsetX": 0.1,
      "offsetY": 0.1
    }
  }
}
      This example has been generated automatically.
    • #1Selection presence
      • application/json
      Message IDPresenceSelection
      object

      Examples

      {
  "type": "presence.selection",
  "requestId": "string",
  "eventId": "string",
  "sketchId": "string",
  "clientTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "serverTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "payload": {}
}
      This example has been generated automatically.
    • #2Hover presence
      • application/json
      Message IDPresenceHover
      object

      Examples

      {

  "requestId": "string",
  "eventId": "string",
  "sketchId": "string",
  "clientTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "serverTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "payload": {}
}

      • application/json
      Message IDPresenceTool
      object

      {

  • REQUEST /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/ws

    Bidirectional WebSocket channel for one sketch document.

    Client should first load initial state through REST: GET /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}

    Then it should connect to this WebSocket and send session.join.

    Operation IDbeginDrag

    Available only on servers:

    • local
    • production
    object
    sketchIdstring
    required

    Sketch identifier from the URL path.

    Accepts the following message:

    Begin drag
    • application/json
    Message IDDragBegin
    object

    Examples

    {
  "type": "drag.begin",
  "requestId": "string",
  "sketchId": "string",
  "payload": {
    "entityId": "string",
    "kind": "point",
    "baseVersion": 0
  }
}
    This example has been generated automatically.
    REPLY INFORMATION

    REPLY CHANNEL INFORMATION

    Reply will be provided via this designated address: /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/ws
    Address: /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/ws

    Bidirectional WebSocket channel for one sketch document.

    Client should first load initial state through REST: GET /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}

    Then it should connect to this WebSocket and send session.join.

    Available only on servers:

    • local
    • production
    Messages:
    • #0Join session
      • application/json
      Message IDSessionJoin
      object

      Examples

      • #1 Example - Join with last seen version
        {
  "type": "session.join",
  "requestId": "req_join_1",
  "sketchId": "sk_123",
  "clientTime": "2026-05-21T10:00:00Z",
  "payload": {
    "lastSeenVersion": 42,
    "clientId": "browser_tab_01",
    "supportedProtocolVersion": 1
  }
}
    • #1Session joined
      • application/json
      Message IDSessionJoined
      object

      Examples

      • #1 Example - Joined
        {
  "type": "session.joined",
  "requestId": "req_join_1",
  "eventId": "evt_001",
  "sketchId": "sk_123",
  "serverTime": "2026-05-21T10:00:01Z",
  "payload": {
    "protocolVersion": 1,
    "currentVersion": 42,
    "missingOpsAvailable": false,
    "user": {
      "userId": "usr_1",
      "displayName": "David",
      "role": "editor",
      "clientId": "browser_tab_01"
    },
    "activeUsers": [
      {
        "userId": "usr_2",
        "displayName": "Alex",
        "role": "editor",
        "clientId": "browser_tab_02"
      }
    ]
  }
}
    • #2User joined
      • application/json
      Message IDSessionUserJoined
      object

      Examples

      {
  "type": "session.user_joined",
  "eventId": "string",
  "sketchId": "string",
  "serverTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "payload": {
    "userId": "string",
    "displayName": "string",
    "role": "reader",
    "clientId": "string"
  }
}

  • SEND /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/ws

    Bidirectional WebSocket channel for one sketch document.

    Client should first load initial state through REST: GET /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}

    Then it should connect to this WebSocket and send session.join.

    Operation IDsendDragPreview

    Available only on servers:

    • local
    • production
    object
    sketchIdstring
    required

    Sketch identifier from the URL path.

    Accepts the following message:

    Drag preview
    • application/json
    Message IDDragPreview
    object

    Examples

    {
  "type": "drag.preview",
  "requestId": "string",
  "eventId": "string",
  "sketchId": "string",
  "clientTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "serverTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "payload": {
    "userId": "string",
    "clientId": "string",
    "lockId": "string",
    "entityId": "string",
    "target": {
      "x": 0.1,
      "y": 0.1
    }
  }
}
    This example has been generated automatically.

  • REQUEST /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/ws

    Bidirectional WebSocket channel for one sketch document.

    Client should first load initial state through REST: GET /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}

    Then it should connect to this WebSocket and send session.join.

    Operation IDcommitDrag

    Available only on servers:

    • local
    • production
    object
    sketchIdstring
    required

    Sketch identifier from the URL path.

    Accepts the following message:

    Commit drag
    • application/json
    Message IDDragCommit
    object

    Examples

    {
  "type": "drag.commit",
  "requestId": "string",
  "sketchId": "string",
  "payload": {
    "lockId": "string",
    "baseVersion": 0,
    "clientOpId": "string",
    "op": {
      "type": "create_point",
      "x": 0.1,
      "y": 0.1,
      "pointId": "string",
      "entityId": "string",
      "constraintId": "string",
      "dimensionId": "string",
      "value": 0.1,
      "radius": 0.1,
      "clockwise": true,
      "closed": true,
      "start": {
        "kind": "existing_point",
        "pointId": "string",
        "x": 0.1,
        "y": 0.1
      },
      "end": {
        "kind": "existing_point",
        "pointId": "string",
        "x": 0.1,
        "y": 0.1
      },
      "center": {
        "kind": "existing_point",
        "pointId": "string",
        "x": 0.1,
        "y": 0.1
      },
      "target": {
        "x": 0.1,
        "y": 0.1
      },
      "cornerA": {
        "x": 0.1,
        "y": 0.1
      },
      "cornerB": {
        "x": 0.1,
        "y": 0.1
      },
      "points": [
        {
          "x": 0.1,
          "y": 0.1
        }
      ],
      "constraint": {
        "id": "string",
        "type": "coincident",
        "refs": [
          "string"
        ],
        "branch": "external",
        "status": "active"
      },
      "dimension": {
        "id": "string",
        "type": "distance",
        "refs": [
          "string"
        ],
        "value": 0.1,
        "driving": true,
        "orientation": "cw"
      }
    }
  }
}
    This example has been generated automatically.
    REPLY INFORMATION

    REPLY CHANNEL INFORMATION

    Reply will be provided via this designated address: /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/ws
    Address: /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/ws

    Bidirectional WebSocket channel for one sketch document.

    Client should first load initial state through REST: GET /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}

    Then it should connect to this WebSocket and send session.join.

    Available only on servers:

    • local
    • production
    Messages:
    • #0Join session
      • application/json
      Message IDSessionJoin
      object

      Examples

      • #1 Example - Join with last seen version
        {
  "type": "session.join",
  "requestId": "req_join_1",
  "sketchId": "sk_123",
  "clientTime": "2026-05-21T10:00:00Z",
  "payload": {
    "lastSeenVersion": 42,
    "clientId": "browser_tab_01",
    "supportedProtocolVersion": 1
  }
}
    • #1Session joined
      • application/json
      Message IDSessionJoined
      object

      Examples

      • #1 Example - Joined
        {
  "type": "session.joined",
  "requestId": "req_join_1",
  "eventId": "evt_001",
  "sketchId": "sk_123",
  "serverTime": "2026-05-21T10:00:01Z",
  "payload": {
    "protocolVersion": 1,
    "currentVersion": 42,
    "missingOpsAvailable": false,
    "user": {
      "userId": "usr_1",
      "displayName": "David",
      "role": "editor",
      "clientId": "browser_tab_01"
    },
    "activeUsers": [
      {
        "userId": "usr_2",
        "displayName": "Alex",
        "role": "editor",
        "clientId": "browser_tab_02"
      }
    ]
  }
}
    • #2User joined
      • application/json
      Message IDSessionUserJoined
      object

      Examples

      {
  "type": "session.user_joined",
  "eventId": "string",
  "sketchId": "string",
  "serverTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "payload": {
    "userId": "string",
    "displayName": "string",
    "role": "reader",
    "clientId": "string"
  }
}
      This example has been generated automatically.
    • #3User left
      • application/json
      Message IDSessionUserLeft
      object

  "serverTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "payload": {
    "userId": "string",
    "clientId": "string",
    "reason": "disconnect"
  }
}

    • #9Hover presence
      • application/json

  "type": "presence.selection",
  "requestId": "string",
  "eventId": "string",

  "type": "error",
  "requestId": "string",
  "eventId": "string",
  "sketchId": "string",
  "serverTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "payload": {
    "code": "INVALID_MESSAGE",
    "message": "string",
    "details": {}
  }
}
      This example has been generated automatically.

  • REQUEST /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/ws

    Bidirectional WebSocket channel for one sketch document.

    Client should first load initial state through REST: GET /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}

    Then it should connect to this WebSocket and send session.join.

    Operation IDsubmitOperation

    Available only on servers:

    • local
    • production
    object
    sketchIdstring
    required

    Sketch identifier from the URL path.

    Accepts the following message:

    Submit persistent operation
    • application/json
    Message IDOpSubmit
    object

    Examples

    {
  "type": "op.submit",
  "requestId": "string",
  "sketchId": "string",
  "payload": {
    "baseVersion": 0,
    "clientOpId": "string",
    "op": {
      "type": "create_point",
      "x": 0.1,
      "y": 0.1,
      "pointId": "string",
      "entityId": "string",
      "constraintId": "string",
      "dimensionId": "string",
      "value": 0.1,
      "radius": 0.1,
      "clockwise": true,
      "closed": true,
      "start": {
        "kind": "existing_point",
        "pointId": "string",
        "x": 0.1,
        "y": 0.1
      },
      "end": {
        "kind": "existing_point",
        "pointId": "string",
        "x": 0.1,
        "y": 0.1
      },
      "center": {
        "kind": "existing_point",
        "pointId": "string",
        "x": 0.1,
        "y": 0.1
      },
      "target": {
        "x": 0.1,
        "y": 0.1
      },
      "cornerA": {
        "x": 0.1,
        "y": 0.1
      },
      "cornerB": {
        "x": 0.1,
        "y": 0.1
      },
      "points": [
        {
          "x": 0.1,
          "y": 0.1
        }
      ],
      "constraint": {
        "id": "string",
        "type": "coincident",
        "refs": [
          "string"
        ],
        "branch": "external",
        "status": "active"
      },
      "dimension": {
        "id": "string",
        "type": "distance",
        "refs": [
          "string"
        ],
        "value": 0.1,
        "driving": true,
        "orientation": "cw"
      }
    }
  }
}
    This example has been generated automatically.
    REPLY INFORMATION

    REPLY CHANNEL INFORMATION

    Reply will be provided via this designated address: /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/ws
    Address: /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/ws

    Bidirectional WebSocket channel for one sketch document.

    Client should first load initial state through REST: GET /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}

    Then it should connect to this WebSocket and send session.join.

    Available only on servers:

    • local
    • production
    Messages:
    • #0Join session
      • application/json
      Message IDSessionJoin
      object

      Examples

      • #1 Example - Join with last seen version
        {
  "type": "session.join",
  "requestId": "req_join_1",
  "sketchId": "sk_123",
  "clientTime": "2026-05-21T10:00:00Z",
  "payload": {
    "lastSeenVersion": 42,
    "clientId": "browser_tab_01",
    "supportedProtocolVersion": 1
  }
}
    • #1Session joined
      • application/json
      Message IDSessionJoined
      object

      Examples

      • #1 Example - Joined
        {
  "type": "session.joined",
  "requestId": "req_join_1",
  "eventId": "evt_001",
  "sketchId": "sk_123",
  "serverTime": "2026-05-21T10:00:01Z",
  "payload": {
    "protocolVersion": 1,
    "currentVersion": 42,
    "missingOpsAvailable": false,
    "user": {
      "userId": "usr_1",
      "displayName": "David",
      "role": "editor",
      "clientId": "browser_tab_01"
    },
    "activeUsers": [
      {
        "userId": "usr_2",
        "displayName": "Alex",
        "role": "editor",
        "clientId": "browser_tab_02"
      }
    ]
  }
}
    • #2User joined
      • application/json
      Message IDSessionUserJoined
      object

      Examples

      {
  "type": "session.user_joined",

  "sketchId": "string",
  "serverTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "payload": {
    "userId": "string",
    "displayName": "string",
    "role": "reader",
    "clientId": "string"
  }

  "payload": {
    "currentVersion": 0,
    "reason": "client_too_far_behind",
    "recommendedAction": "fetch_snapshot"
  }
}
      This example has been generated automatically.
    • #30State snapshot

    • #0Operation committed
      • application/json
      Message IDOpCommitted
      object

      Examples

      {
  "type": "op.committed",
  "requestId": "string",
  "eventId": "string",
  "sketchId": "string",
  "serverTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "payload": {
    "opId": "string",
    "version": 0,
    "actorUserId": "string",
    "clientOpId": "string",
    "op": {
      "type": "create_point",
      "x": 0.1,
      "y": 0.1,
      "pointId": "string",
      "entityId": "string",
      "constraintId": "string",
      "dimensionId": "string",
      "value": 0.1,
      "radius": 0.1,
      "clockwise": true,
      "closed": true,
      "start": {
        "kind": "existing_point",
        "pointId": "string",
        "x": 0.1,
        "y": 0.1
      },
      "end": {
        "kind": "existing_point",
        "pointId": "string",
        "x": 0.1,
        "y": 0.1
      },
      "center": {
        "kind": "existing_point",
        "pointId": "string",
        "x": 0.1,
        "y": 0.1
      },
      "target": {
        "x": 0.1,
        "y": 0.1
      },
      "cornerA": {
        "x": 0.1,
        "y": 0.1
      },
      "cornerB": {
        "x": 0.1,
        "y": 0.1
      },
      "points": [
        {
          "x": 0.1,
          "y": 0.1
        }
      ],
      "constraint": {
        "id": "string",
        "type": "coincident",
        "refs": [
          "string"
        ],
        "branch": "external",
        "status": "active"
      },
      "dimension": {
        "id": "string",
        "type": "distance",
        "refs": [
          "string"
        ],
        "value": 0.1,
        "driving": true,
        "orientation": "cw"

    },

      "entities": {},
      "constraints": {},

          "code": "string",

            "string"
          ],

            "string"
          ],
          "dimensionIds": [
            "string"

  }
}

  • REQUEST /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/ws

    Bidirectional WebSocket channel for one sketch document.

    Client should first load initial state through REST: GET /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}

    Then it should connect to this WebSocket and send session.join.

    Operation IDacquireLock

    Available only on servers:

    • local
    • production
    object
    sketchIdstring
    required

    Sketch identifier from the URL path.

    Accepts the following message:

    Acquire lock
    • application/json
    Message IDLockAcquire
    object

    Examples

    {
  "type": "lock.acquire",
  "requestId": "string",
  "sketchId": "string",
  "payload": {
    "scope": {
      "type": "entity",
      "entityId": "string",
      "constraintId": "string",
      "dimensionId": "string",
      "componentId": "string"
    },
    "mode": "edit",
    "ttlMs": 1000
  }
}
    This example has been generated automatically.
    REPLY INFORMATION

    REPLY CHANNEL INFORMATION

    Reply will be provided via this designated address: /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/ws
    Address: /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/ws

    Bidirectional WebSocket channel for one sketch document.

    Client should first load initial state through REST: GET /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}

    Then it should connect to this WebSocket and send session.join.

    Available only on servers:

    • local
    • production
    Messages:
    • #0Join session
      • application/json
      Message IDSessionJoin
      object

      Examples

      • #1 Example - Join with last seen version
        {
  "type": "session.join",
  "requestId": "req_join_1",
  "sketchId": "sk_123",
  "clientTime": "2026-05-21T10:00:00Z",
  "payload": {
    "lastSeenVersion": 42,
    "clientId": "browser_tab_01",
    "supportedProtocolVersion": 1
  }
}
    • #1Session joined
      • application/json
      Message IDSessionJoined
      object

      Examples

      • #1 Example - Joined
        {
  "type": "session.joined",
  "requestId": "req_join_1",
  "eventId": "evt_001",
  "sketchId": "sk_123",
  "serverTime": "2026-05-21T10:00:01Z",
  "payload": {
    "protocolVersion": 1,
    "currentVersion": 42,
    "missingOpsAvailable": false,
    "user": {
      "userId": "usr_1",
      "displayName": "David",
      "role": "editor",
      "clientId": "browser_tab_01"
    },
    "activeUsers": [
      {
        "userId": "usr_2",
        "displayName": "Alex",
        "role": "editor",
        "clientId": "browser_tab_02"
      }
    ]
  }
}
    • #2User joined
      • application/json
      Message IDSessionUserJoined
      object

      Examples

      {

  "payload": {
    "userId": "string",
    "displayName": "string",

  }

  "sketchId": "string",
  "serverTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "payload": {
    "clientOpId": "string",
    "currentVersion": 0,
    "reason": "stale_base_version",
    "message": "string",
    "diagnostics": [
      {
        "level": "info",
        "code": "string",
        "message": "string",
        "entityIds": [
          "string"
        ],
        "constraintIds": [
          "string"
        ],
        "dimensionIds": [
          "string"
        ]

    ]
  }
}

    • #21Operations batch

      object

      Examples

  "type": "ops.batch",
  "eventId": "string",

  "serverTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "payload": {
    "fromVersion": 0,
    "toVersion": 0,
    "ops": [
      {
        "opId": "string",
        "version": 0,
        "actorUserId": "string",
        "clientOpId": "string",
        "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
        "op": {
          "type": "create_point",
          "x": 0.1,
          "y": 0.1,
          "pointId": "string",

          "constraintId": "string",

          "radius": 0.1,

            "refs": [

  • REQUEST /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/ws

    Bidirectional WebSocket channel for one sketch document.

    Client should first load initial state through REST: GET /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}

    Then it should connect to this WebSocket and send session.join.

    Operation IDrefreshLock

    Available only on servers:

    • local
    • production
    object
    sketchIdstring
    required

    Sketch identifier from the URL path.

    Accepts the following message:

    Refresh lock
    • application/json
    Message IDLockRefresh
    object

    Examples

    {
  "type": "lock.refresh",
  "requestId": "string",
  "sketchId": "string",
  "payload": {
    "lockId": "string",
    "ttlMs": 1000
  }
}
    This example has been generated automatically.
    REPLY INFORMATION

    REPLY CHANNEL INFORMATION

    Reply will be provided via this designated address: /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/ws
    Address: /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/ws

    Bidirectional WebSocket channel for one sketch document.

    Client should first load initial state through REST: GET /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}

    Then it should connect to this WebSocket and send session.join.

    Available only on servers:

    • local
    • production
    Messages:
    • #0Join session
      • application/json
      Message IDSessionJoin
      object

      Examples

      • #1 Example - Join with last seen version
        {
  "type": "session.join",
  "requestId": "req_join_1",
  "sketchId": "sk_123",
  "clientTime": "2026-05-21T10:00:00Z",
  "payload": {
    "lastSeenVersion": 42,
    "clientId": "browser_tab_01",
    "supportedProtocolVersion": 1
  }
}
    • #1Session joined
      • application/json
      Message IDSessionJoined
      object

      Examples

      • #1 Example - Joined
        {
  "type": "session.joined",
  "requestId": "req_join_1",
  "eventId": "evt_001",
  "sketchId": "sk_123",
  "serverTime": "2026-05-21T10:00:01Z",
  "payload": {
    "protocolVersion": 1,
    "currentVersion": 42,
    "missingOpsAvailable": false,
    "user": {
      "userId": "usr_1",
      "displayName": "David",
      "role": "editor",
      "clientId": "browser_tab_01"
    },
    "activeUsers": [
      {
        "userId": "usr_2",
        "displayName": "Alex",
        "role": "editor",
        "clientId": "browser_tab_02"
      }
    ]
  }
}
    • #2User joined
      • application/json
      Message IDSessionUserJoined
      object

      {

    "displayName": "string",

  }
}

  • REQUEST /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/ws

    Bidirectional WebSocket channel for one sketch document.

    Client should first load initial state through REST: GET /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}

    Then it should connect to this WebSocket and send session.join.

    Operation IDreleaseLock

    Available only on servers:

    • local
    • production
    object
    sketchIdstring
    required

    Sketch identifier from the URL path.

    Accepts the following message:

    Release lock
    • application/json
    Message IDLockRelease
    object

    Examples

    {
  "type": "lock.release",
  "requestId": "string",
  "sketchId": "string",
  "payload": {
    "lockId": "string"
  }
}
    This example has been generated automatically.
    REPLY INFORMATION

    REPLY CHANNEL INFORMATION

    Reply will be provided via this designated address: /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/ws
    Address: /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}/ws

    Bidirectional WebSocket channel for one sketch document.

    Client should first load initial state through REST: GET /api/v1/sketches/{sketchId}

    Then it should connect to this WebSocket and send session.join.

    Available only on servers:

    • local
    • production
    Messages:
    • #0Join session
      • application/json
      Message IDSessionJoin
      object

      Examples

      • #1 Example - Join with last seen version
        {
  "type": "session.join",
  "requestId": "req_join_1",
  "sketchId": "sk_123",
  "clientTime": "2026-05-21T10:00:00Z",
  "payload": {
    "lastSeenVersion": 42,
    "clientId": "browser_tab_01",
    "supportedProtocolVersion": 1
  }
}
    • #1Session joined
      • application/json
      Message IDSessionJoined
      object

      Examples

      • #1 Example - Joined
        {
  "type": "session.joined",
  "requestId": "req_join_1",
  "eventId": "evt_001",
  "sketchId": "sk_123",
  "serverTime": "2026-05-21T10:00:01Z",
  "payload": {
    "protocolVersion": 1,
    "currentVersion": 42,
    "missingOpsAvailable": false,
    "user": {
      "userId": "usr_1",
      "displayName": "David",
      "role": "editor",
      "clientId": "browser_tab_01"
    },
    "activeUsers": [
      {
        "userId": "usr_2",
        "displayName": "Alex",
        "role": "editor",
        "clientId": "browser_tab_02"
      }
    ]
  }
}
    • #2User joined

      object
